response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a promo for '風真いろは生誕LIVE2026 Wind Trails'. 2. Examined the audio throughout the entire video and determined it consists of instrumental background music and talking by the performer. 3. Confirmed no vocal songs are performed. 4. Searched for the title to verify if 'Wind Trails' was a song, and it was confirmed to be the name of the birthday concert. 5. Constructed the JSON based on the findings, setting contains_vocal_music to false for all scenes.
response.global_summary: An introductory video for Hololive VTuber Kazama Iroha's 2026 birthday concert event, titled 'Wind Trails'. The video consists of a title screen followed by the performer speaking to the audience and providing instructions for the upcoming live stream event. No vocal songs are performed during this segment, which only features instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Still image title screen for 'Wind Trails' with instrumental background music playing.
Performer Kazama Iroha is shown on stage, welcoming the audience and providing instructions for the concert livestream.
The performer moves to a performance position; the camera remains on the stage set with instrumental music continuing.
